s: In 2007, Dan Giese suited up for SFG as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.820, WHIP 1.070, SO 7, WAR -0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (SFG -> NYY).
In 2008, Dan Giese suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.530, WHIP 1.220, SO 29, WAR 0.500. Notable context: Joined NYY.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYY -> OAK).
In 2009, Dan Giese suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.320, WHIP 1.410, SO 11, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined OAK.
